subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up — great to hear from you after the conference. We'd be glad to set up a formal meeting to discuss potential collaboration.

Here are some available slots:

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Let us know which time suits you best and we'll get it on the calendar.

As for the direct contact details of our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm unable to share internal contact information. For the appropriate channels to reach our leadership team, please visit our public website.

Looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards
